cards.title: Anthracite with ash up to 7%
cards.subtitle: Stable quality directly from the mine.
cards.description: We control metrics for every batch so you get exactly the coal you ordered.

cards.title: Quality guarantee
cards.subtitle: Documented quality confirmation for each shipment.
cards.description: Quality passport and control at every stage from the mine to loading.

cards.title: Delivery and geography
cards.subtitle: Delivery across Russia, CIS, Turkey and Europe.
cards.description: Truck, rail and charter through our own terminal in Rostov port. We select the optimal route by volume and timing, from single truck loads to vessel lots.

cards.title: Volume and stability
cards.subtitle: Over 150,000 tons per month with stable supply.
cards.description: Own production allows us to keep pricing, lead times and volumes stable.

homeDifferences.title: What sets us apart
homeDifferences.leadRest: is the exclusive representative of the "Progress" and "Komsomolets Donbassa" mines.
homeDifferences.body: A direct contract with the producer eliminates intermediaries, reduces costs, and ensures quality control at the extraction stage. This allows us to keep competitive pricing and deliver a stable product with verified characteristics.
